title: Taskboard
subtitle: ai_studio/taskboard
description: Durable project work state: projects, epics, tasks, context digest, and task-store validation.

children.description: Taskboard contract for project, epic, and task files, statuses, durable context, and task CLI usage.
Detailed task-store reference for project, epic, task fields, lifecycle, and maintenance rules.

children.title: nt-taskboard-manager
children.description: Thin Codex skill router for Taskboard work. It activates task capture, planning, reporting, and status updates, then routes agents to the Taskboard product/API contract.
Public Taskboard CLI for listing, context digest, project/epic/task create/update, and task-store validation.
Small public Taskboard store facade for root lookup, list/find, project ensure/create, epic/task create/update, payload builders, and validation.
Single durable markdown store implementation for constants, path layout, frontmatter parsing, templates, list/create/ensure/update/archive, lookup, stable JSON payloads, and validation.
Workspace-mounted Taskboard store resolver for public Studio and explicit game stores, qualified IDs, aggregate payloads, and private-store inclusion policy.
Canonical Taskboard markdown store for projects, epics, active tasks, and archived tasks.
Taskboard HTTP API adapter for project/epic/task CRUD routes. Studio Shell mounts it but does not own the Taskboard domain contract.
Taskboard browser surface. Served by Studio Shell; Taskboard owns the surface content, not the shared server.

children.title: Surface Implementation
children.subtitle: public static files
children.description: Static browser files behind the Taskboard surface. Hidden from the default graph so the page is represented as one surface unless implementation details are needed.

children.title: index.html
children.description: Taskboard browser document hosted at /taskboard/ by Studio Shell.

children.title: style.css
children.description: Taskboard page-specific styling. Shared navigation styling comes from Studio Shell.

children.title: app.js
children.description: Taskboard browser behavior for loading, filtering, editing, and rendering project-scoped tasks through the shared Taskboard API.

children.title: markdown_preview.js
children.description: Small Markdown preview helper used by the Taskboard browser surface.
Taskboard regression tests for parsing, commands, context, project references, validation, API routes, and task lifecycle behavior.
